task_completion.description: The agent entered the target URL into a web crawling tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'https://books.toscrape.com/' entered into the starting URL bar of a GUI web crawler (such as Screaming Frog SEO Spider).

task_completion.description: The agent configured a URL rewrite rule to change 'catalogue' to 'store'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a settings or configuration window (e.g., 'URL Rewriting' or 'Regex Replace') showing a rule that replaces the word 'catalogue' with 'store'.

task_completion.description: The agent executed the crawl of the target website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a populated list of URLs in the main interface of the crawling tool and a progress bar indicating the crawl is running or has reached 100%.

task_completion.description: The crawled URLs reflect the rewrite rule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the list of crawled URLs in the tool's main window. You should see multiple URLs containing the '/store/' path segment (e.g., '/store/category/books/...') instead of the original '/catalogue/' path.

task_completion.description: The agent exported the Internal HTML data to the specified CSV file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box showing the file being saved as 'migration_simulation.csv' inside the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical web crawling tool rather than a terminal script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that a GUI application (like Screaming Frog) is open and being interacted with, rather than the agent writing a Python/Bash script in the terminal to generate a mock CSV.

integrity.description: The crawler interface shows realistic site data indicating a real crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the crawler displays various columns of data (Status Codes, Content Type, Title, etc.) for multiple URLs, proving it actually fetched data from books.toscrape.com.

integrity.description: The CSV was exported from the tool, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent uses the 'Export' or 'Save' function of the crawling tool and does not manually type or paste URLs into a text editor or spreadsheet program to fake the output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is 'https://books.toscrape.com/'. The site naturally contains many URLs with the '/catalogue/' path segment. The agent must configure a rewrite rule to change 'catalogue' to 'store'. The VLM should verify that at least 10 URLs in the crawl results show the new '/store/' path. The final export must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/migration_simulation.csv'.
